name: Array.prototype.map
description: Implement a custom version of the Array.prototype.map method that transforms an array without mutating the original. Your function should accept an array, a callback, and an optional thisArg, returning a new array populated with the results of calling the callback on every element. The callback must receive the current element, index, and the original array as arguments. This task tests your ability to handle higher-order functions, preserve immutability, and manage function context correctly

testCases.description: Check if index and array are passed to callback
Immutability: original array should not be modified
